description: Discovery taxonomy — what the generator prompt asks for / extracts from upstream intents before sizing cables.

inputs.description: Standards family — selects ampacity table + Vd targets
Voltage / phases / frequency / earthing system from db-layout-rollup or engineer
true if db-layout-rollup intent supplies circuit list; false if engineer-declared
Per-circuit Ib/In/load_type/phases (engineer fallback when intent absent)
true if fault-level intent supplies Ifault per node
REQUIRED engineer overlay: length_m + installation_method per cable segment
Optional list of segments routed through thermal insulation
Optional per-circuit harmonic_content_pct (default 0, must declare for IT/VFD/LED ≥10kW)
Optional per-circuit Vd-limit override (e.g. tighter client spec)
Optional per-segment preference (PVC singles / SWA / XLPE / FP200 / MICC / THWN-2 etc.)
US-only: terminal temperature rating (60/75/90°C) per NEC 110.14(C)
Optional motor LRA multipliers if non-default (NEMA Design B=6, C=5, IEC AA=7, AB=6)
Optional client-specification overrides for Vd/Iz margin
